display.purpose: Page titles only — once per screen.

label.purpose: Buttons, form labels, navigation, table headers.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Open/close panel, tab switch, sidebar collapse.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #c96b2c; color: #f7f6f3; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #c96b2c; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #c96b2c; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #c96b2c; color: #f7f6f3; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #f7f6f3; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(226,224,219,0.2); border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8c8a86; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #c96b2c; }

components.name: Content Card
components.html:
Article title goes here
A short preview of the article body or description text for context.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(226,224,219,0.2); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; color: #f7f6f3; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #5c5b58; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Main sidebar nav item with icon + label.
components.html: DigestCompose
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; color: #5c5b58; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #f7f6f3; } .ds-nav-active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #c96b2c; }

components.name: Filter Chip (Active)
components.css: .ds-chip-active { background: #c96b2c; color: #f7f6f3; padding: 4px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Filter Chip (Inactive)
components.css: .ds-chip-inactive { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #8c8a86; padding: 4px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-chip-inactive:hover { color: #f7f6f3; }

narrative.overview:
Raw material flows in — RSS feeds, web searches, topic seeds — passes through the forge of LLM processing, and emerges as refined, publishable content. The interface is the pipeline control room: precise instruments, clear readouts, direct manipulation.

The system is editorial and tactile — a dark canvas that evokes the quiet focus of a writer's workspace, not a glowing SaaS dashboard. Surfaces sit in tonal layers rather than floating on shadows. Typography carries the hierarchy: Fraunces serif for headings (authoritative, warm, editorial), Inter sans for body (clean, efficient, technical). The burnt orange accent is the single point of action — every time it appears, it means 'do this thing.'

Forge explicitly rejects the generic AI-tool aesthetic: no purple gradients, no glassmorphism, no cute robot illustrations, no sparkle-emoji overload. The interface is restrained because the content is the point. Motion is purposeful and state-communicating. The tool disappears; the writing remains.
keyCharacteristics: Single accent color reserved exclusively for primary actions and active selection
Restrained motion — state transitions only, no decorative choreography
Consistent component vocabulary across every screen

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Burnt orange is the single action color. It appears on buttons, selection rings, and active nav items — nowhere else. If an element needs a color to communicate state, it uses success (green), danger (red), or neutral (gray), never a second accent.

rules.name: The Tonal Layer Rule
rules.body: Depth is conveyed through lightness difference, not shadow. Elevated surfaces are brighter (higher lightness) than the base, on a single plane.

rules.name: The One-Family Interface Rule
rules.body: Buttons, labels, navigation, body, and data use Inter exclusively. Fraunces is reserved for page and section titles only.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest and in their natural state. The only depth cue is the lightness step between layers. Shadows do not exist.

dos: Do use burnt orange for exactly one primary action per screen. Its rarity communicates importance.
Do prefer tonal layering over box shadows for depth.
Do use Fraunces for page titles (once per page) and Inter for everything else.
Do keep body text at WCAG AA contrast (≥4.5:1 against background).
Do use skeleton screens (shimmer animation) for content loading in lists and cards.
Do use direct descriptive language in error messages — no apologies, no emoji, no 'Oops!'
Do keep motion under 200ms for UI transitions and 320ms for full-screen changes.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion to disable all animations for users who request it.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS purple/blue gradients anywhere in the interface.
Don't use glassmorphism (blur + transparency as a decorative surface treatment).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient backgrounds).
Don't use cute robot or friendly-AI illustrations.
Don't use 'magical AI' tone in copy — no sparkle emoji, no 'look what AI can do.'
Don't put Fraunces (display font) in buttons, labels, navigation items, or body text.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or lists.
Don't use display/h1 font sizes in sidebars, modals, or compact panels.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, top, left) — prefer transform and opacity.
Don't use right-aligned text in left-to-right interfaces.
Don't create identical card grids — vary content density and layout rhythm.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats).
